DISCOVERY 302, RESPONDENT GEICO INDEMNITY COMPANY'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWER TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUET FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND TO COMPEL CLAIMANTS DEPOSITION AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN WHOLE AS TO THE MOTIONS TO COMPEL. AS TO THE MOTION FOR SANCTIONS, COUNSEL IS TO CONFER WITH THE CLERK TO MAKE SURE THEY HAVE THE LAST KNOWN CONTACT INFORMATION FOR PETITIONER. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND SUBMIT IT TO JUDGE PRO TEM STEPHEN ZOLLMAN FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEPHEN ZOLLMAN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Nov-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-06-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***The Court intends to dismiss this case pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance at the next hearing and compliance.*** Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to SEP-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories And Requet For Production Of Documents; And To Compel Claimants Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Respondent GEICO Indemnity Company's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answer To Form Interrogatories Special Interrogatories And Requet For Production Of Documents; And To Compel Claimants Deposition And For Sanctions is Granted in whole as to the motions to compel. As to the motion for sanctions, counsel is to confer with the clerk to make sure they have the last known contact information for Petitioner. The moving party is to prepare a form of order and submit it to Judge Pro Tem Stephen Zollman for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Stephen Zollman, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/JPT/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set July 17, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Craig M. Boeger of the law offices of Boeger Law Firm (925-240-2408) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

There being no opposition and appearance by plaintiff, Attorney Craig M. Boeger's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel of Record for PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS SAAVEDRA is GRANTED. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR No. 11185, e-mail: adelgado@sftc.org (L&M302)
